case_title: CHUNG, ANTHONY et al VS BALASANYAN, GAYANE BORISOUNA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, ANTHONY LE, MY LINH THI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALASANYAN, GAYANE BORISOUNA BALASANYAN, MARINA $2,620.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, $1370.00 FOR ANTHONY CHUNG; $1250.00 FOR LE, MY LINH THI. EACH IS ENTITLED TO ONE HALF OF THE COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
